examples: When Stephen Covey, founder and director of the Leadership Institute, explored leadership styles in the past decade, he focused on the habits of a great number of highly effective individuals.
From The 7 Habits of Highly Effective Families by Stephen covey.
Our hearts go out to his beloved wife Sandra and the entire Covey family.
He founded Covey Leadership Center, which in 1997 merged with Franklin Quest to create FranklinCovey Co.
